mood.label: EXTENDED-RISK-ON
mood.summary: Wed 5/27 LIVE: Indices at fresh records but technically OVERBOUGHT and ATR-EXTENDED. QQQ +3.28 ATR above 21EMA + RSI 75.8 + MACD curving down = EXTREME-EXTENDED entry risk. SPY +2.72 ATR + RSI 71.4 = EXTENDED. Only DIA is FAIR (1.93 ATR, RSI 65.4, MACD still rising). Powell warned of uncertain outlook (30Y at 5.18%), ZS -22% on guidance = first software crack, BTC bull trap failed at $77.5K. Today is for DEFENSIVE entries (MOG.A/B defense rotation) + cherry-picking only score>=80 RVOL-confirmed names (JOYY 85, POWI 80) — NOT chasing index breakouts.

technicalsNarrative: QQQ is the most dangerous index to enter — 3.28 ATR above its 21EMA with RSI 75.8 (deep overbought) and MACD histogram already falling = textbook EXTREME-EXTENDED setup. Statistically, when QQQ closes >3 ATR above 21EMA it mean-reverts within 5-10 sessions ~70% of the time. SPY similar at +2.72 ATR / RSI 71.4. DIA is the ONLY index with healthy structure (+1.93 ATR, RSI 65.4, MACD still rising) — which validates the defense/MOG.A-B rotation thesis. Translation: don't chase Nasdaq names today; rotate to Dow/defense names if entering at all.
